testcase.name: Questionnaire Test Suite › Verify access questionnaire from another user.
testcase.system-out: ℹ️ [2026-03-18T01:44:44.852Z] [INFO] [timeoutManager.js:68] Test setup: launching browser and logging in ℹ️ [2026-03-18T01:44:46.377Z] [INFO] [LoginPage.js:25] email= denny.nguyen.professional@gmail.com pass= Testdemo! ℹ️ [2026-03-18T01:44:47.206Z] [INFO] [LoginPage.js:54] verifyUserLoggedIn 🐞 [2026-03-18T01:44:49.108Z] [DEBUG] [LoginPage.js:66] 👉 "Accept" button detected, clicking... 🐞 [2026-03-18T01:44:49.169Z] [DEBUG] [LoginPage.js:77] ⚠️ Waiting 5000ms for server to stabilize... ✅ [2026-03-18T01:44:54.189Z] [SUCCESS] [LoginPage.js:80] ✅ Login successful! ✅ [2026-03-18T01:44:54.191Z] [SUCCESS] [timeoutManager.js:67] ✅ Login successful ℹ️ [2026-03-18T01:44:54.339Z] [INFO] [timeoutManager.js:68] baseURL= https://myezra-staging.ezra.com/ ℹ️ [2026-03-18T01:44:54.340Z] [INFO] [timeoutManager.js:68] user1= [object Object] ℹ️ [2026-03-18T01:44:54.340Z] [INFO] [timeoutManager.js:68] user2= [object Object] ℹ️ [2026-03-18T01:44:54.340Z] [INFO] [timeoutManager.js:68] 🧪 Step 1.
